svg.metadata:
{"type":"seqgraph","mermaid":"sequenceDiagram participant App participant RC as RestClient participant Int as Interceptor participant Blob as BlobStore
Manager participant IDB as IndexedDB
or Delegate participant Dirty as DirtyTracker App->>RC: postBinary('/1.0/Artifact/3/Binary', file) RC->>Int: _isBinaryURL? (yes) RC->>Int: _handleBinaryUpload Int->>Blob: storeBlob('Artifact:3:v1', file, meta) Blob->>IDB: put blob entry IDB-->>Blob: ok Blob-->>Int: ok Int->>Dirty: trackBinaryMutation('Artifact', 3, 'Artifact:3:v1') Int-->>RC: synthesized 200 RC-->>App: cb(null, response) App->>RC: getBinaryBlob('/1.0/Artifact/3/Binary') RC->>Int: _handleBinaryDownload Int->>Blob: getBlob('Artifact:3:v1') Blob->>IDB: get IDB-->>Blob: { blob, metadata } Blob-->>Int: blob Int-->>RC: synthesized response with blob RC-->>App: cb(null, response, blob) ","style":"notebook"}
